posts.author: ProjectMastermind (IngenuityKat)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The Storage view provides a breakdown of file types and total usage, but lacks the context needed to manage storage effectively.

Key limitations:
No ownership visibility by department, workspace, or user
No trend data showing growth over time
No identification of large, unused, duplicate, or aging files
No drill-down into specific files
No differentiation between high-value and low-value storage

This results in visibility without the ability to take action.

What are you trying to achieve

We need to actively manage storage, not just monitor it.
Specifically:
Identify which department or workspaces are driving storage usage
Track growth trends and anticipate future needs
Surface cleanup opportunities such as unused or duplicate files
Understand storage value versus waste
Take direct action from within the reporting view
The goal is to reduce waste, improve governance, and maintain efficiency.
